keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $716.62 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $734.18 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Neutral — watch only — wait for confirmation.
Signals are conflicted — let the first 30 minutes set the tone before committing risk.
Use QQQ $716.62 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: TSLA PUT — enter $19.13–$21.15, target $30.21+, stop $12.08.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +0.84% and SPY +0.13%. Composite sentiment +11 (Neutral). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, sector rotation, vix. VIX at 13.84 (-2.31%). Environment read: watch only — wait for confirmation. Healthcare (+0.49%) is leading while Communication (-1.65%) lags. Premarket strength in AMD, JPM; weakness in AAPL, PLTR. The desk's highest-conviction setup is TSLA (7.0/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
